issues.impact: Market-gap edge and CLV cannot be evaluated without same-time prices for at least one model-supported market.
issues.recommendation: Store Polymarket orderbook/price snapshots at every prediction cutoff; winner markets are preferred, supported non-winner markets remain diagnostic-only.

issues.impact: Sources were snapshotted after the replay cutoff, so the content may not exactly match what was knowable at prediction time.
issues.recommendation: For formal replay, collect immutable source snapshots before each prediction cutoff or use an archived source with a verifiable historical capture.

issues.impact: The highest-probability driver did not match the actual winner in this diagnostic replay.
issues.recommendation: Inspect actual-winner probability/rank, then separate model weakness from missing inputs.

issues.impact: A market snapshot exists for the event, but it was captured after the replay cutoff and is excluded from edge comparison.
issues.recommendation: Keep after-cutoff rows excluded from scoring; replace them only if a same-time orderbook/price snapshot is available.

issues.impact: Seed scenario labels differ from FastF1, but the replay actual winner is already taken from the canonical FastF1 result.
issues.recommendation: Keep seed results scenario-only and retain the FastF1 result path in replay diagnostics.

issues.impact: No previous-race FastF1 form exists before the season opener; this is an expected point-in-time feature boundary rather than a data-ingestion failure.
issues.recommendation: Keep the opener explicit in diagnostics, and add preseason testing or verified race-week practice features when available.

root_causes.diagnosis: The replay can score race outcomes, but it cannot validate market edge or CLV without same-time prices for model-supported markets across most completed races.
root_causes.evidence: 3/9 scored replay rows have cutoff-valid supported-market snapshots; 6 are missing cutoff-valid rows and 2 have after-cutoff rows excluded.
root_causes.improvement: Archive live Polymarket order-book snapshots at each future cutoff, and import reviewed historical CLOB definitions plus price history for completed 2026 races; use winner markets for formal winner-edge claims and supported non-winner markets for diagnostic gaps.

root_causes.diagnosis: The Codex evidence layer is populated, but some evidence was snapshotted after the prediction cutoff without cutoff-valid archive proof.
root_causes.evidence: 3 replay rows still rely on retrospective source snapshots; 5 scored rows have archive-backed source proof.
root_causes.improvement: Replace retrospective rows with pre-cutoff snapshots or verified Wayback captures, and keep source-audit gating mandatory before ingesting claims.

root_causes.diagnosis: The strategy-aware race-time simulator often keeps the true winner in contention, but its top-pick calibration is not strong enough for an edge claim.
root_causes.evidence: Diagnostic top-pick hit rate is 0.6667; median actual-winner rank is 1; 8/9 actual winners were ranked in the top 3.
root_causes.improvement: Add stronger qualifying/practice/session features, calibrate the tyre/weather/strategy parameters against historical races, and track probability calibration before comparing against markets.

root_causes.diagnosis: Some seed scenario labels differ from canonical FastF1 results, but replay already uses FastF1 as the actual-result authority.
root_causes.evidence: 3 seed rows required canonical FastF1 result override.
root_causes.improvement: Keep seed labels scenario-only, refresh seed fixtures from canonical result snapshots, and preserve the override warning as provenance.

root_causes.diagnosis: The first race has no same-season prior-race FastF1 form by design; this is a point-in-time feature horizon boundary rather than a data failure.
root_causes.evidence: 1 replay row has no previous-race form features.
root_causes.improvement: Add preseason testing, prior-season carryover, and race-week practice features so the opener is not driven mainly by seed priors.
